item.title: 苹果或「小幅重新设计」macOS 27 的液态玻璃界面
item.guid: 苹果或「小幅重新设计」macOS-27-的液态玻璃界面
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Apple plans a visual redesign of the "Liquid Glass" interface in macOS 27, set to debut at the upcoming WWDC developer conference in June. 据彭博社报道，苹果计划在即将于六月 WWDC 开发者大会亮相的 macOS 27 中，针对「Liquid Glass」界面进行视觉重构。

The report suggests that because most Mac devices currently still use LCD screens, the rendering effects of transparency, shadows, and glass textures in the "Liquid Glass" design language are inferior to those on OLED panels, leading to reduced readability in dense text areas of the Control Center, Finder, and some sidebars. 报道认为，由于目前大部分 Mac 设备仍搭载 LCD 屏幕，「Liquid Glass」设计语言的透明度、阴影及玻璃质感的渲染效果不及 OLED 面板，导致控制中心、访达及部分侧边栏的密集文本区域出现可读性下降的问题。

To address this display flaw, Apple is internally preparing a "minor redesign" for macOS 27, focusing on optimizing the rendering mechanisms for shadows and transparency. The report also notes that iOS 27 and iPadOS 27 will include a series of interface tweaks, with the overall direction being cleanup and refinement rather than a major overhaul. 为解决这一显示瑕疵，苹果内部正在为 macOS 27 筹备一次「小幅重新设计」，重点优化阴影及透明度的渲染机制。报道同时指出，iOS 27 和 iPadOS 27 也将包含一系列界面微调，整体方向是清理和打磨，而非大幅重构。

On the functional front, the report states that Apple is testing a "Tab Organization" feature for the Safari browser, which can automatically group tabs by browsing topic. 在功能层面，报道称苹果正在测试 Safari 浏览器的「整理标签页」功能，可自动将标签页按浏览主题分组。

item.title: 曝字节跳动上调今年资本开支至逾 2000 亿元，加码 AI 基建
item.guid: 曝字节跳动上调今年资本开支至逾-2000-亿元，加码-AI-基建
item.description:
According to the South China Morning Post, ByteDance has raised its 2026 AI capital expenditure plan to over 200 billion yuan, an increase of at least 25% compared to the 160 billion yuan plan initially discussed at the end of last year. 据《南华早报》报道，字节跳动已将 2026 年 AI 资本开支计划上调至逾 2000 亿元人民币，较去年底初步讨论的 1600 亿元方案增幅至少 25%。

Sources say the main drivers for this increase in spending include the company's continued deep commitment to its AI business and the ongoing rise in memory chip costs. Notably, the report states that ByteDance also increased the proportion of domestically produced AI chips purchased in this budget adjustment. 知情人士称，此次增支的主要驱动因素包括公司对 AI 业务的持续深度押注，以及内存芯片成本的持续上涨。值得注意的是，报道称字节跳动在本次预算调整中还提高了国产 AI 芯片的采购比例。

item.title: 微信灰度测试「组合支付」：转账可同时用零钱和银行卡
item.guid: 微信灰度测试「组合支付」：转账可同时用零钱和银行卡
item.description:
Recently, according to a blogger's sharing, WeChat is gray-testing a "combined payment" feature, allowing users to complete payments using two payment methods simultaneously when transferring money to friends, such as "WeChat Pay Balance + Bank Card" or "WeChat Pay Balance + Lingqiantong," solving the previous problem of needing to withdraw cash or gather funds separately when the balance was insufficient. 近日，据博主分享，微信正在灰度测试「组合支付」功能，允许用户在好友转账时同时使用两种支付方式完成付款，如「微信零钱 + 银行卡」或「微信零钱 + 零钱通」，解决了此前零钱余额不足时需单独提现或凑款的问题。

According to Kuai Technology, combined payment supports a maximum of two payment methods. Tencent customer service responded that this feature is currently limited to the transfer checkout scenario and is not yet supported for sending red packets or online/offline shopping payments, but it is gradually being rolled out. 另据快科技报道，组合支付最多支持两种支付方式的组合。腾讯客服回应称，该功能目前仅限转账收银台场景使用，发红包及线上、线下购物支付场景暂不支持，并正在逐步开放中。

item.title: 曝阿里巴巴将整合千问与淘宝，推出 AI 对话购物功能
item.guid: 曝阿里巴巴将整合千问与淘宝，推出-AI-对话购物功能
item.description:
According to Reuters, Alibaba is preparing to integrate its AI platform, Tongyi Qianwen, with its e-commerce platform, Taobao, to launch an AI agent feature that drives shopping through conversation. 据路透社报道，阿里巴巴正准备将旗下 AI 平台千问与电商平台淘宝进行整合，推出以对话驱动购物的 AI 智能体功能。

According to the report, once integrated, users will be able to browse products, compare prices, and complete purchases directly within the Tongyi Qianwen App by conversing with AI, without needing to manually scroll through product lists. 根据报道，整合完成后，用户可直接在千问 App 内通过与 AI 对话的方式浏览商品、比价并完成购买，无需手动翻阅商品列表。

Tongyi Qianwen will access the complete catalog of over 4 billion items from Taobao and Tmall, and will be equipped with a "skill library" to handle logistics tracking and after-sales service. Additionally, the system will provide personalized recommendations based on users' historical orders and shopping preferences. 千问将接入淘宝和天猫超过 40 亿件商品的完整目录，并配备一套「技能库」，可处理物流跟踪与售后服务。此外，系统将根据用户的历史订单和购物偏好提供个性化推荐。

item.title: 「马斯克版 Codex」曝光
item.description:
According to TestingCatalog, testing details for Grok Build, Elon Musk's cross-platform desktop code tool, recently appeared unexpectedly on the Grok web interface, with an interface and functionality similar to Codex and Claude Code. 据 TestingCatalog 报道，马斯克旗下全平台桌面代码工具 Grok Build 的测试细节近日意外出现在 Grok 网页端，界面与功能类似于 Codex 和 Claude Code。

The report states that Grok Build supports macOS, Linux, and Windows platforms, can autonomously execute multi-step development tasks, supports direct reading of Git code trees, manages local files and folders, and can autonomously launch developer servers. 报道称，Grok Build 支持 macOS、Linux 和 Windows 三大平台，可自主执行多步开发任务，支持直接读取 Git 代码树、管理本地文件与文件夹，并能自主启动开发者服务器。

    Parallel Agents: Users can send the same prompt to multiple AI agents simultaneously, supporting both Grok Code 1 Fast and Grok 4 Fast models, with a maximum of four concurrent agents per model, totaling up to eight running simultaneously, with results displayed side-by-side;

    Arena Mode: Currently only seen at the code level, the design idea is to have agents compete against each other and automatically score and rank them, rather than having users manually compare output results.

item.title: 魏建军：汽车不是快消品，中国车企出海要保证长期可信赖
item.guid: 魏建军：汽车不是快消品，中国车企出海要保证长期可信赖
item.description:
According to Sina Technology, Wei Jianjun, Chairman of Great Wall Motor, held a dialogue with several media outlets yesterday during the 2026 Great Wall Motor Smart Factory Half Marathon event, discussing the topic of Chinese car companies expanding overseas. 据新浪科技报道，长城汽车董事长魏建军昨日在 2026 长城汽车智慧工厂半程马拉松活动期间，与多家媒体就中国车企出海话题进行了对话。

Wei Jianjun stated in the dialogue that unlike fast-moving consumer goods, automobiles have a longer life cycle and higher value, representing the second largest expenditure for most families after purchasing a home. Users are relatively sensitive to both resale value and usage costs. 魏建军在对话中表示，汽车与快消品不同，生命周期较长、价值量较大，是大多数家庭在购房之后的第二大支出，用户对保值率和使用成本均较为敏感。

He believes that Chinese car companies expanding overseas must prioritize high quality, genuinely ensuring product quality and after-sales service. If quality and after-sales service cannot be delivered, even the long-term survival of the enterprise itself becomes problematic, directly harming overseas consumers' trust in Chinese brands. 他认为，中国车企走出去必须以高质量为前提，切实保障产品品质和售后服务；一旦质量与售后无法兑现，甚至企业自身的长期存续都成问题，将直接损害海外消费者对中国品牌的信任。

item.title: 美国企业开始回避「AI 原生」毕业生：会用 ChatGPT，但不会独立思考
item.guid: 美国企业开始回避「AI-原生」毕业生：会用-ChatGPT，但不会独立思考
item.description:
According to Futurism, several American companies have found that "AI-native" university graduates entering the workforce in recent years generally lack depth of thought. Some employers have begun actively avoiding STEM graduates with AI proficiency, instead favoring job seekers with humanities backgrounds. 据 Futurism 报道，多家美国企业发现，近年来进入职场的「AI 原生」大学毕业生普遍存在思维深度不足的问题，部分雇主已开始主动回避具备 AI 使用能力的 STEM 毕业生，转而青睐人文学科背景的求职者。

A New York financial industry professional told Gillian Tett, a reporter for the Financial Times, that their institution currently values critical thinking skills more than AI operational skills and has adjusted its recruitment strategy accordingly. 一位纽约金融业从业者向《金融时报》记者 Gillian Tett 表示，其所在机构目前更看重批判性思维能力，而非 AI 操作技能，并已调整招聘策略。

The report points out that it has become quite common for American university students to "outsource" a large amount of their coursework to AI tools like ChatGPT. This trend not only affects students' written expression abilities but has also begun to impact the quality of participation in face-to-face classroom discussions. 报道指出，美国高校学生将课业大量「外包」给 ChatGPT 等 AI 工具的情况已相当普遍，这一趋势不仅影响了学生的书面表达能力，也开始波及课堂面对面讨论的参与质量。

Troy Jollimore, a professor of ethics at California State University, Chico, warned in an interview with The New Yorker that "a large number of students will leave university with degrees and enter the workforce, while they are effectively illiterate." 加州州立大学奇科分校伦理学教授 Troy Jollimore 在接受《纽约客》采访时警告，「大量学生将带着学位走出大学、进入职场，而他们实际上处于文盲状态」。

item.title: 💡 格力 CMO 朱磊：越是 AI 技术普及的时代，「真实」的价值越不可替代
item.guid: 💡-格力-CMO-朱磊：越是-AI-技术普及的时代，「真实」的价值越不可替代
item.description:
According to the National Business Daily, Zhu Lei, CMO of Gree Electric Appliances, recently delivered a speech at the "2026 10th China Listed Companies Brand Value List Release Conference," stating that in an era where AI technology is increasingly prevalent, the value of "authenticity" becomes even more irreplaceable. 据《每日经济新闻》报道，格力电器 CMO 朱磊日前在「2026 第十届中国上市公司品牌价值榜发布会」上发表演讲提出，越是 AI 技术普及的时代，「真实」的价值越不可替代。

If your brand hasn't come alive in the real world but has in the AI world, what are you? A fraud. If your brand is thriving and very popular in the real world, then it will certainly thrive and become popular in the AI world too.

He believes that if a brand lacks a foundation in the real world, it will be difficult to build lasting trust, even if it is briefly active in the AI world. For this reason, Gree has chosen over the past year to have its executives personally participate in a series of extreme scenario tests as its core marketing strategy. 他认为，品牌若在现实世界中缺乏根基，即便在 AI 世界中短暂活跃，也难以建立持久信任。为此，格力过去一年多时间选择让高管亲身下场，以系列极限场景实测作为核心营销方式。

Zhu Lei stated that Gree's core standard for defining "true AI" home appliances is to bring consumers practical value that is "more money-saving, more convenient, and more worry-free," rather than limiting AI to superficial functions like voice control. 朱磊表示，格力定义「真 AI」家电的核心标准是为消费者带来「更省钱、更省事、更省心」的实际价值，而非将 AI 停留在语音控制等表层功能。

item.title: 微软开源 Phi-Ground 模型家族：让 AI 准确点击屏幕，五项评测 10B 以下全部第一
item.guid: 微软开源-Phi-Ground-模型家族：让-AI-准确点击屏幕，五项评测-10B-以下全部第一
item.description:
Microsoft recently open-sourced the Phi-Ground model family. This series of models focuses on a specific problem: giving AI a screenshot and an instruction, and having it accurately output the coordinates to click. 微软于近日开源了 Phi-Ground 模型家族。该系列模型专注于一个具体问题：给 AI 一张屏幕截图和一条指令，让它准确输出应该点击的坐标位置。

The open-source Phi-Ground-Any-4B has approximately 4B parameters. The official claim is that, under test conditions where it's paired with a large model to assist in understanding instructions, its click accuracy surpasses OpenAI Operator and Claude Computer Use, and it achieved first place in all five mainstream evaluations for models with fewer than 10B parameters. 开源的 Phi-Ground-Any-4B 参数量约 4B，官方宣称其在搭配大模型辅助理解指令的测试条件下，点击准确率超过了 OpenAI Operator 和 Claude Computer Use，并在五项主流评测中拿下 10B 参数以下模型的全部第一。

🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/microsoft/Phi-Ground-Any 🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/microsoft/Phi-Ground-Any

item.title: 智源联合多家机构发布大模型安全平台 FlagSafe
item.guid: 智源联合多家机构发布大模型安全平台-FlagSafe
item.description:
The Beijing Academy of Artificial Intelligence (BAAI), in collaboration with Peking University, Shanghai Jiao Tong University, the Chinese Academy of Sciences, and other institutions, officially launched the FlagSafe large model security platform yesterday. The platform provides integrated security capabilities for large models, from risk discovery to defense and governance, focusing on three areas: red team exercises, blue team defense, and white-box introspection. 北京智源人工智能研究院昨日联合北京大学、上海交通大学、中国科学院等多家机构，正式发布 FlagSafe 大模型安全平台。平台围绕红队演练、蓝队防御、白盒透视三个方向，为大模型提供从风险发现到防御治理的一体化安全能力。

    Red team exercises are responsible for actively finding vulnerabilities, supporting multi-modal evaluations for text, images, audio, and video, and conducting special detection for embodied intelligence scenarios like robots and hidden behaviors such as models being "outwardly compliant, inwardly deceptive";

    Blue team defense is responsible for patching vulnerabilities, covering model training safety alignment, AI agent runtime protection, harmful content identification and remediation, and dynamic monitoring of cyberspace risk content. White-box introspection delves deep into the model, tracing the origin of risks and pinpointing specific training data to provide a basis for remediation.

The platform sets five insurmountable red lines based on the "Beijing AI Safety International Consensus," including prohibiting autonomous replication and improvement, prohibiting assistance in designing weapons of mass destruction, and prohibiting launching destructive cyberattacks. 平台基于《北京 AI 安全国际共识》设定了五条不可逾越的红线，包括禁止自主复制改进、禁止协助设计大规模杀伤性武器、禁止发动破坏性网络攻击等。

item.title: 寿司郎母公司上调净利润预测至 300 亿日元、今秋进军纽约
item.guid: 寿司郎母公司上调净利润预测至-300-亿日元、今秋进军纽约
item.description:
According to Nikkei, Sushiro's parent company, FOOD & LIFE COMPANIES (F&LC), announced yesterday an upward revision of its full-year earnings forecast, expecting consolidated net profit (IFRS basis) to increase by 31% year-on-year to 30 billion yen by September 2026. 据《日本经济新闻》报道，寿司郎母公司 FOOD & LIFE COMPANIES（F&LC）昨日宣布上调全年业绩预期，预计截至 2026 年 9 月的合并净利润（IFRS 口径）将同比增长 31%，达到 300 亿日元。

Operating revenue, based on sales, is expected to increase by 18% year-on-year to 505 billion yen, and operating profit is projected to grow by 34% to 48.5 billion yen, representing an upward revision of 20 billion yen and 8 billion yen, respectively, from previous forecasts. 作为销售额口径的营业收入预计同比增长 18% 至 5050 亿日元，营业利润预计同比增长 34% 至 485 亿日元，分别较此前预测上调 200 亿日元和 80 亿日元。

The company continues to expand its stores in mainland China and Southeast Asian markets, achieving significant growth. As of the end of March this year, the company's overseas store count reached 279, with plans to increase this number to over 320 by the end of September this year. 在中国内地和东南亚市场，公司持续扩张门店，实现大幅增长。截至今年 3 月底，公司海外门店数量达到 279 家，并计划于今年 9 月底前将这一数字提升至 320 家以上。

The company also revealed plans to open its first "Sushiro" store in New York, USA, this autumn, marking the brand's official entry into the North American market. 公司还透露，计划于今年秋季在美国纽约开设首家「寿司郎」门店，标志着品牌正式进入北美市场。

item.title: 哈啰回应员工脚踩青桔美团：涉事人员已依规处理
item.guid: 哈啰回应员工脚踩青桔美团：涉事人员已依规处理
item.description:
According to BBN News, Hello Inc. yesterday provided a further response regarding the photo of an employee gathering "stepping on Qingju and Meituan bikes," stating that the individuals involved have been dealt with according to regulations, and professional ethics and conduct education has been rolled out company-wide. 据鞭牛士报道，哈啰出行昨日就员工聚会「脚踩青桔美团」照片作出进一步回应，表示涉事人员已依规处理，并在全公司范围内开展职业道德与规范教育。

A photo recently circulated on social media shows several Hello employees riding Hello bikes, with some stepping on fallen Qingju and Meituan bikes, and collectively giving a thumbs-up. 近期在社交平台流传的一张照片显示，多名哈啰员工骑在哈啰单车上，其中有人脚踩倒地的青桔和美团单车，并集体竖起大拇指。

After the photo drew widespread attention, Hello's official customer service responded, stating, "This behavior is indeed very inappropriate, an erroneous act by individual employees, completely inconsistent with the company's requirements and values, and we absolutely will not tolerate it." 照片引发广泛关注后，哈啰官方客服回应称，「这种行为确实非常不妥，是个别员工的错误做法，完全不符合公司的要求和价值，我们绝对不容忍。」

item.title: 乐高推出 F1 法拉利双星头盔套组
item.guid: 乐高推出-F1-法拉利双星头盔套组
item.description:
According to NOWRE, LEGO recently officially launched the Editions series Ferrari team dual-star helmet sets, corresponding to the helmet liveries of the two Ferrari drivers for the 2025 season, Charles Leclerc (43014) and Lewis Hamilton (43022), respectively. 据 NOWRE 报道，乐高近日正式开售 Editions 系列法拉利车队双星头盔套组，分别对应 2025 赛季两位法拉利车手夏尔 · 勒克莱尔（43014）与刘易斯 · 汉密尔顿（43022）的头盔涂装。

    The Leclerc version features Ferrari's iconic Rosso Corsa (racing red) as its main color, incorporating white and red lines with Monaco flag elements, and recreates driver number 16 and the "Papa Jules" inscription in memory of his father, containing a total of 886 pieces;

    The Hamilton version presents his new visual identity after moving to Ferrari, with Modena yellow as the main color, detailing the iconic number 44 and sponsor logos, containing a total of 884 pieces. Both finished models are approximately 18 cm tall.

Notably, this is the first time LEGO has launched exclusive minifigures for active F1 drivers. Both sets include an exclusive minifigure of the corresponding driver and a display plaque with a replica signature. 值得关注的是，这是乐高首次为 F1 现役车手推出专属人仔。两款套装均内含对应车手的独占人仔及印有亲签样式的展示铭牌。

item.title: 《监狱来的妈妈》定档 5 月 30 日
item.description:
The film "Mom from Prison" is scheduled for national release on May 30th. 电影《监狱来的妈妈》定档 5 月 30 日全国上映。

The film is based on a true story. The protagonist, Zhao Xiaohong, accidentally caused her husband's death while resisting domestic violence. After serving ten years in prison, she personally starred in her own experience, winning the Silver Shell for Best Protagonist at the 73rd San Sebastián International Film Festival for her role as "Mother Liao Hong" in the film. 影片根据真实故事改编，主角赵箫泓因反抗家暴失手致丈夫死亡，入狱十年后亲自出演自身经历，凭借片中「母亲廖红」一角荣获第 73 届圣塞巴斯蒂安电影节最佳主角银贝壳奖。

item.title: 动画电影《钟馗》定档 5 月 30 日
item.guid: 动画电影《钟馗》定档-5-月-30-日
item.description:
The animated film "Zhong Kui" officially announced its release date on May 30, targeting the family-friendly market for the June 1 Children's Day holiday. 动画电影《钟馗》官宣定档 5 月 30 日上映，主打六一儿童节档期合家欢市场。

The film features the Chinese folk mythological figure Zhong Kui as the protagonist, telling a fantastical story of human girl Chujiu accidentally entering the underworld and joining Zhong Kui to capture demons and subdue monsters. 影片以中国民间神话人物钟馗为主角，讲述人间少女初九误闯地府、与钟馗一同捉妖降魔的奇幻故事。
